system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_order_report2","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_ORDER_REPORT2 (@year int)
AS
BEGIN
	-- DECLARE @year int = 2026
	DECLARE @THANG_TRONG_NAM TABLE
	(
		id int,
		thang nvarchar(50)
	)

	INSERT INTO @THANG_TRONG_NAM(id, thang)
	VALUES  (1, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 1, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(2, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 2, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(3, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 3, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(4, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 4, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(5, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 5, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(6, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 6, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(7, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 7, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(8, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 8, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(9, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 9, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(10, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 10, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(11, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 11, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN')),
			(12, FORMAT(DATEFROMPARTS(@year, 12, 1), 'MMM', 'vi-VN'))

	SELECT T.thang, 
		sodonhang_doanhso = SUM(sodonhang_doanhso), 
		tongtien_doanhso = SUM(tongtien_doanhso),
		sodonhang_doanhthu = SUM(sodonhang_doanhthu), 
		tongtien_doanhthu = SUM(tongtien_doanhthu),
		sodonhang_dukien = SUM(sodonhang_dukien), 
		tongtien_dukien = SUM(tongtien_dukien)
	FROM (
		SELECT FORMAT(A.order_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN') AS thang, 
			COUNT(DISTINCT A.order_number) AS sodonhang_doanhso, 
			SUM(B.amount) as tongtien_doanhso,
			0 AS sodonhang_doanhthu,
			0 AS tongtien_doanhthu,
			0 AS sodonhang_dukien,
			0 AS tongtien_dukien
		--INTO #DOANHSO_DONHANG
		FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
			AND YEAR(A.order_date) = @year
			AND COALESCE(A.IsExample, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsPhoi, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsUV, 0) = 0
		GROUP BY FORMAT(A.order_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT FORMAT(A.ship_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN') AS thang, 
			0 AS sodonhang_doanhso,
			0 AS tongtien_doanso,
			COUNT(DISTINCT A.order_number) AS sodonhang_doanhthu, 
			SUM(B.amount) as tongtien_doanhthu,
			0 AS sodonhang_dukien,
			0 AS tongtien_dukien
		--INTO #DOANTHU_DONHANG
		FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
			AND YEAR(A.ship_date) = @year AND A.ship_date <= CONVERT(date, GETDATE())
			AND COALESCE(A.IsExample, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsPhoi, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsUV, 0) = 0
		GROUP BY FORMAT(A.ship_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN')
		UNION ALL
		SELECT FORMAT(A.ship_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN') AS thang, 
			0 AS sodonhang_doanhso,
			0 AS tongtien_doanso,
			0 AS sodonhang_doanhthu,
			0 AS tongtien_doanhthu,
			COUNT(DISTINCT A.order_number) AS sodonhang_dukien, 
			SUM(B.amount) as tongtien_dukien
		--INTO #DOANTHU_DUKIEN
		FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
		WHERE A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'
			AND YEAR(A.ship_date) = @year AND A.ship_date > CONVERT(date, GETDATE())
			AND COALESCE(A.IsExample, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsPhoi, 0) = 0
			AND COALESCE(A.IsUV, 0) = 0
		GROUP BY FORMAT(A.ship_date, 'MMM', 'vi-VN')
	) AS COMBINED RIGHT JOIN @THANG_TRONG_NAM T ON COMBINED.thang = T.thang
	GROUP BY T.id, T.thang
	ORDER BY T.id
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
